title: deinandra increscens subsp. foliosa
intro: Deinandra increscens subsp. foliosa is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, that is native to California and Baja California. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Deinandra increscens subsp. foliosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
